objective: Resolve degraded inference service under misleading operational signals.
incident_summary: Requests are timing out and operators suspect a worker restart issue after a config rollout.
logs:
INFO: Handling inference request...
WARN: Task aborted timeout=20ms.
ERROR: request_timeout_ms exceeded before model execution.
WARN: Worker 4 heartbeat missed (misleading signal: restart might be needed?).
INFO: Worker 4 recovered.
WARN: Task aborted timeout=20ms.
recent_deploy: Pushed global inference configuration. Aggressively tightened request_timeout_ms to 20ms to prevent long-running stalls. Restarted one sluggish worker previously.
